task_completion.description: Select patient Fatima Al-Sayed for appointment scheduling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see 'Fatima Al-Sayed' or 'P-ANC-001' selected in the patient field of an appointment scheduling form or viewed in the patient dashboard.

task_completion.description: Schedule the first ANC visit for April 1, 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see an appointment scheduled or being scheduled with the date '04/01/2026' (or April 1, 2026) and a description containing 'ANC Visit 1'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the second ANC visit for May 6, 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see an appointment scheduled or being scheduled with the date '05/06/2026' (or May 6, 2026) and a description containing 'ANC Visit 2'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the third ANC visit for June 3, 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see an appointment scheduled or being scheduled with the date '06/03/2026' (or June 3, 2026) and a description containing 'ANC Visit 3'.

task_completion.description: Schedule the fourth ANC visit for July 1, 2026.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see an appointment scheduled or being scheduled with the date '07/01/2026' (or July 1, 2026) and a description containing 'ANC Visit 4'.

task_completion.description: Verify all four appointments are successfully saved in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The VLM should see a list of appointments in the patient's profile or the scheduling calendar showing the four distinct ANC visits.

integrity.description: The agent used the HospitalRun graphical user interface to schedule the appointments.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the HospitalRun web application in a browser, not terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the scheduling forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with date pickers, text fields, and save buttons within the application.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the expected output into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no text editors (like nano, vim, gedit, or notepad) used to display the appointment details as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Fatima Al-Sayed, Patient ID: P-ANC-001. Expected Appointments: 1) Date: 2026-04-01, Description: 'anc visit 1'; 2) Date: 2026-05-06, Description: 'anc visit 2'; 3) Date: 2026-06-03, Description: 'anc visit 3'; 4) Date: 2026-07-01, Description: 'anc visit 4'.
